Type Property# rotateAutoReverse

iOS 2.0+iPadOS 2.0+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+

```
static let rotateAutoReverse: CAAnimationRotationMode
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/quartzcore/caanimationrotationmode/rotateautoreverse#Discussion)

The objects travel at a 180 degree tangent to the path.
